full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Understanding how to design an ablation experiment for the sparse SVM model
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How can I design an ablation study to evaluate the importance of L1 regularization in sparse SVM?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: The experiment was structured by comparing two models: L1 sparse SVM and L2 regular SVM.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped design a controlled experiment to evaluate the effect of sparsity on model behavior.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: The comparison setup was verified to ensure both models use the same dataset and preprocessing steps.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Selecting implementation method for sparse and regular SVM models
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How can L1 and L2 SVM models be implemented in sklearn for comparison?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Two LinearSVC models were implemented with penalty parameters set to L1 and L2 respectively.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped implement both model variants required for the ablation study.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked sklearn documentation to ensure correct parameters were used.

full_llm_interaction_log.purpose: Measuring sparsity in trained SVM models
full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How can the number of zero weights be used to measure sparsity in an SVM model?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: Code was added to count zero weights and compute sparsity ratio for both models.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Allowed quantitative comparison of feature sparsity between L1 and L2 models.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Confirmed that L1 model produces significantly more zero weights.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: What visualization can be used to compare sparsity between two models?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: A bar chart was created to compare the number of zero weights between models.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Provided visual evidence of the difference in sparsity.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Verified that the visualization correctly reflects computed sparsity values.

full_llm_interaction_log.prompt: How should the results of an ablation experiment comparing L1 and L2 SVM be interpreted?
full_llm_interaction_log.student_modification: The discussion section was written explaining how sparsity affects feature selection and model complexity.
full_llm_interaction_log.how_it_helped: Helped structure the interpretation of ablation results.
full_llm_interaction_log.student_verification: Checked that conclusions align with the observed experimental outputs.
